name: @contente/deck-inliner
description: Owned in-repo build that turns an editable .dc.html Contente onboarding deck into a single self-contained offline .html a non-technical clinic owner opens by double-click.

scripts.prep: node build/prep/vendor-runtime.mjs && node build/prep/vendor-fonts.mjs && node build/prep/optimize-images.mjs
scripts.build: node build/inline.mjs --deck templates/ghl-calendar-setup --title 'GHL Calendar Setup — Contente' --out GhlCalendarSetup.html
